title: /passwd
text: /passwd Creates a password for the newly created Uniface Server or Uniface Router account. /passwd Password Use With /newacc Parameters Password —a password of at least 4 characters Description You cannot use /passwd to change the password of an existing account. However, you can use /delacc to remove it, and then recreate it with /newacc and /passwd . Related Links Manually Creating and Deleting Uniface Router and Server Accounts If the installer was unable to create accounts for the Uniface Server and Uniface Router on Microsoft Windows, you can manually create these accounts. /delacc Delete a Uniface Router or Uniface Server account on Windows platforms.
